Document:
# Space Law Trieste Port operates under SolGov Space Law. All citizens and visitors aboard the settlement are expected to follow these laws.
Foreign invaders, ninjas, and pirates, are not protected under space law. Traitors are not foreign invaders so are usually protected by space law.
Space Law is not the server rules, but some rules reference Space Law and require it to be followed by certain people or to some degree.
## Command Succession The acting head of Trieste is the position of Overseer. When the Overseer is not present, either by absence or hostile situation, an Acting Overseer may be appointed according to this chain: - Head of Personnel - Marshal - Harbormaster - Chief Engineer - Chief Medical Officer - Research Director - Warden
The Acting Overseer inherits all power and responsibility of the Overseer, with the exception of execution approval authority, until the acting position is no longer required.
[color=#a4885c]Succession of Department Heads:[/color] If any department head is absent or unable to perform their duties, a member of their department may be appointed by the Overseer to be an Acting Head. If the Marshal is absent the Warden assumes the role of Acting Marshal without requiring approval from the Overseer. Any Acting Head must obtain additional access from the Overseer as soon as possible.
## Legal Intervention Lawyers aboard the settlement are expected to be able to uphold justice on the rig, and act as an intermediary between the citizens of Trieste, SolGov, and Security teams. They should avoid interfering with the charging and sentencing procedure of prisoners, but are permitted (and expected) to be present during appeals, paroles, and detentions as a legal counsel.
Should the citizens of Trieste, or the Lawyer, feel that Security and Command are failing to uphold the law or protect the people of Trieste, they may fax local SolGov authorities. Security is expected to be following the law and ensuring prisoners are given fair sentences, as such the appeals system (under Prisoner Rights) is in place to ensure that people feel they are given a fair sentence. If Security and the Overseer commit unreasonable failure to ensure the citizens of Trieste are given fair treatment then citizens, with or without a Lawyer for representation, may contact SolGov. This also extends to severe cases of Abuse of Power, where no one aboard the rig is willing or capable of arresting the offending members of Security or the Overseer.
Lawyers are also permitted to oversee civil lawsuits, if the occassion arises. In a civil case the Overseer is expected to act as a judge.
